body.summary: Auto-generated adapter package for Provider Bridge from minimal docs + API key input.
body.config_fragment:
[generated_sources.providers.provider_bridge]
enabled = true
api_key_envs = ['PROVIDER_BRIDGE_API_KEY']
base_url = "https://api.provider-bridge.example"
docs_url = "https://provider-bridge.example/docs"
category = "fundamentals"
auth_style = "header"
response_format = "json"

config_candidate.docs_summary: https://provider-bridge.example/docs Base URL: https://api.provider-bridge.example Financial data endpoint with JSON responses for filings and balance sheet data.

body.generated_test_code:
from __future__ import annotations

from sentinel_alpha.infra.generated_sources.provider_bridge import ProviderBridgeSource


def test_provider_bridge_adapter_builds_query_paths(monkeypatch) -> None:
    adapter = ProviderBridgeSource(base_url="https://api.provider-bridge.example")
    calls = []

    def fake_request(path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> dict:
        calls.append((path, params or {}))
        return {"ok": True, "path": path, "params": params or {}}

    adapter._request_json = fake_request  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    adapter.fetch_financials("AAPL")
    adapter.fetch_history("AAPL", interval="1d", lookback="1mo")

    assert len(calls) == 2
    assert calls[0][0] == 'v1/filings/latest'
    assert calls[1][0] == 'v1/filings/history'
    assert calls[0][1]['ticker'] == "AAPL"
    assert calls[1][1]['period'] == "1d"
body.interface_documentation_summary: https://provider-bridge.example/docs Base URL: https://api.provider-bridge.example Financial data endpoint with JSON responses for filings and balance sheet data.
